title: Capability Descriptor
description: Schema describing a capability — a named permission scoped to resources, tools, or files, with risk and audit metadata. Self-describing via the schema discriminator field.

PermissionsClass.description: Classification of the permission level for a capability

ScopeDefinition.description: Defines the scope and access boundary for a capability — what resources, tools, or files it applies to

scope_type.description: Kind of resource the scope applies to

pattern.description: Glob pattern matching the resources within this scope

is_exclusive.description: If true, no other capability may grant access to the same resources within this scope

RiskLevel.description: Categorization of the risk associated with granting this capability

DeprecationInfo.description: Information about capability deprecation status and migration path

replaced_by.description: The capability_id of the capability that replaces this one

description.description: Description of what the capability grants access to and under what conditions

scopes.description: List of scopes defining the access boundaries for this capability

risk_level.description: Risk level associated with granting this capability

requires_approval.description: Whether granting this capability requires explicit human or automated approval

requires_audit.description: Whether all uses of this capability must be recorded in the audit log

deprecation.description: Optional deprecation information for this capability
